headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 4, 2026**
article:
The New York Mets secured a 4-2 win over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense with a home run and 1 RBI. Juan Mejia impressed in relief, striking out 5 batters in 2 scoreless innings. The Boston Red Sox edged the Detroit Tigers 5-4 in a thrilling finish, with Payton Tolle earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief. Jarren Duran led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 3 runs. The Philadelphia Phillies took down the Miami Marlins in a shutout, with Aaron Nola pitching 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries. Gabe Speier, a left-handed pitcher for the Seattle Mariners, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation. Erik Miller, a left-handed pitcher for the San Francisco Giants, has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 1, 2026, due to low back strain. The Chicago White Sox have transferred Tanner Murray from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. Austin Hays has been placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 2, 2026, due to a left calf strain. The Boston Red Sox have placed Patrick Sandoval on the 60-day injured list due to left UCL surgery recovery and Danny Coulombe on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 2, 2026, due to cervical spasms. The Detroit Tigers have placed Tarik Skubal on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 1, 2026, due to loose bodies in his left elbow. The Los Angeles Angels have placed Yusei Kikuchi on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 30, 2026, due to left shoulder inflammation.

The Atlanta Braves have made a trade, sending catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Washington Nationals have traded 3B Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays have traded 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Rockies in 4-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 4-2 win over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense with a home run and 1 RBI. Juan Mejia impressed in relief, striking out 5 batters in 2 scoreless innings.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Edge Tigers 5-4 in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a narrow 5-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Payton Tolle earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief. Jarren Duran led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Down Blue Jays 5-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 5-1 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Nick Martinez earning the win after pitching 5.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run. Ryan Vilade led the Blue Jays with 1 hit, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Down Marlins in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a 1-0 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Aaron Nola pitching 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Gabe Speier on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners left-handed pitcher Gabe Speier has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to May 3, 2026.

top_news.title: **Braves Make Roster Move Ahead of Series Opener**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves have made a trade, sending catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics in exchange for cash.
